chet holmgren.detail: Played 30 minutes, posted 16 points and 11 rebounds in Game 5 win

de'aaron fox.detail: Fox has been battling an ankle injury since the prior series; Brave search confirms he was ruled out of Game 2 of the West Finals, and sources note he is fighting through the ankle issue
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox has been dealing with a persistent ankle injury since Game 4 of the Western Conference semifinals. He played 33 minutes but was clearly limited by the ankle issue, finishing with only 9 points and narrowly missing his points prop.

dylan harper.detail: Played 25 minutes with no injury flags noted; no external sources available

isaiah hartenstein.detail: Played 31 minutes, recorded 12 points and 15 rebounds in Game 5 win

stephon castle.detail: Played 33 minutes, led San Antonio with 24 points in Game 5 loss

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 38 minutes but went 0-for-5 from three in Game 5 loss; recently cleared from concussion protocol
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama attempted five three-pointers but converted none, missing his 3PM over prop. He shot just 4-of-15 from the field overall and was held in check by OKC's defense, though he played a full 38 minutes with no apparent restrictions.
